title: MySQL Root Account Without Password
description: MySQL 5.0.51a allows remote root login with no password. The root account has full administrative access to all databases. Remote connections are accepted from any host (root@%). Database user credentials and sensitive data can be extracted.
remediation: Set a strong password for the MySQL root account. Remove remote root access. Restrict MySQL to localhost or specific trusted IPs via bind-address and GRANT statements.

issues: CRITICAL severity finding should have stronger evidence
Exploitation proof required for high/critical findings
suggestions: Add command output demonstrating access or data extraction
For critical findings, demonstrate actual impact
Actually exploit the vulnerability and capture output
For SQLi: Show extracted data or UNION-based output
